notes: Wake words now default to Kabosu-facing terms.
Groq is configured for openai/gpt-oss-20b with hidden reasoning.
Aivis Cloud defaults to model UUID 18972473-ca36-4e06-a33a-5cc14adba0c4 and mp3 audio.
Vexa speech uses audio_base64 rather than text TTS.
Wake auto-discovers dashboard-created running bots when VEXA_NATIVE_MEETING_ID is empty.
Dashboard bot creation defaults voice_agent_enabled to true while preserving explicit false.
